name: Adel Kalemcilik Ticaret ve Sanayi A.S.
summary: Adel Kalemcilik Ticaret ve Sanayi A.S. manufactures and sells stationery products in Turkey. It offers wood-cased lead pencils, coloring and copying pencils, ballpoint pens, mechanical leads and graphite, liquid ink pens, markers, crayons, watercolor paints, erasers, finger paints, modeling clays, and gouache paints; and toys. The company offers its products under the Faber-Castell, Graf von Faber-Castell, Adel, Adeland, Atlas, Mark, Auldey, Lotus, NICI, WOW, Pinypon, Nenuco, Oddbods, and Sluban ve Adeland brands. It also exports its products. The company was founded in 1967 and is headquartered in √É¬úmraniye, Turkey.
